title: docs: Add CI section and links

comments.body: @TomSweeneyRedHat this is a very rough first-draft.  Please only look through your left eye, and a pair of sunglasses :smile:   Let me know if there's any general suggestions of content I should add/drop/change.
@TomSweeneyRedHat @rhatdan sorry, maybe my fault.  I was waiting for some initial feedback here, I'm not sure if I should give more details or other details or maybe less?

LGTM
FWIW, I think you hit the mark on the more/less info.  If we find we need more based on feedback, we can add it in.  Nice addition and sorry for missing the initial PR ping.
